title: Furious Customer — Security Breach
description: Angry customer reporting a suspected security breach. Tests Negative sentiment, Critical priority, security language.
subject: SECURITY BREACH — your platform leaked our customer data!!!
body:
I am FURIOUS. We just discovered that your platform has been leaking our customer PII to other tenants for the past WEEK. This is an absolute disaster and frankly it is unacceptable for a so-called enterprise platform.

I demand an immediate explanation. Our legal team is already drafting a notice. We have a regulatory obligation to report this within 72 hours under GDPR and we will be naming your company in that report.

This is a P0 security incident. I expect a senior engineer to call me within the hour. My cell is on file.

I cannot express how disappointed I am. We trusted you with our data.

Jonathan Reeves
CTO, Nexus Technologies
P.S. — Do NOT try to downplay this. We have screenshots.
